summary: Unmerged Corneria stage decomp progress branch. The author explicitly opened it as a handoff/progress record because it would be superseded by another PR by nemo. It added substantial C work in src/melee/gr/grcorneria.c, tightened a few grcorneria.h prototypes, expanded grArwing_GroundVars with flag unions, and added a target_funcs.txt checklist. decomp.dev reported one new full match, grCorneria_801E2110, plus many near-matches in grcorneria, but also a small .sdata regression.

key_files.role: Main Corneria stage decomp work; added local data structs, globals, lbaudio_ax include, and implementations/near-implementations for many grCorneria functions.
Expanded grArwing_GroundVars with xC4/xC6/xE0 flag bitfield unions and changed xD4/xD8 from f32 to s32.
Replaced several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes with concrete signatures for grCorneria_801DCCFC, grCorneria_801DDE88, grCorneria_801E03C8, and grCorneria_801E08CC.
Added a repo-root checklist of grcorneria functions marked complete or still pending.

what_changed: Implemented or substantially drafted many previously placeholder Corneria functions, including grCorneria_801DCCFC, grCorneria_801DD350, grCorneria_801DDAC4, grCorneria_801DDE88, grCorneria_801DFC98, grCorneria_801DFF20, grCorneria_801E01A8, grCorneria_801E0678, grCorneria_801E08CC, grCorneria_801E2110, grCorneria_801E2228, and grCorneria_801E25C4.
Added Corneria-local data modeling: grCn_Entry, grCn_JointPair, grCn_ConvData, and a larger grCn_Data layout with x30, indices, x48, positions, joint_pairs, and entries fields.
Added static Corneria globals grCn_804D69A8 and grCn_804D69B0, plus static s32 color constants grCn_804DB218 through grCn_804DB238 used by grCorneria_801E2110.
Added lb/lbaudio_ax.h and used lbAudioAx_800237A8 in grCorneria_801DDE88 for Arwing-related audio state transitions.

Modeled Corneria initialization and object setup through Ground_801C49F8, grCorneria_801DD534, Ground_801C39C0, Ground_801C3BB4, mpLib_80057BC0, HSD_JObj scale/translation calls, and stage_info flag writes.
Added camera-position based region selection in grCorneria_801E08CC using Camera_GetTransformInterest, Ground_801C2BA4, HSD_JObjGetTranslationX, Ground_801C0498, and an assert fallback.

Added grCorneria_801E2110 color/lighting selection based on grCorneria_801E08CC, feeding GXColor-cast stack locals into Ground_801C058C, Ground_801C05EC, Ground_801C05A4, Ground_801C055C, Ground_801C05BC, and Ground_801C0574.

Added target_funcs.txt with checked functions such as grCorneria_801DD534, grCorneria_801E1878, grCorneria_801E2110, grCorneria_801DCCFC, grCorneria_801DD350, grCorneria_801E25C4, grCorneria_801DDE88, grCorneria_801E08CC, grCorneria_801DFC98, grCorneria_801DFF20, grCorneria_801E01A8, grCorneria_801DDAC4, grCorneria_801E2228, and grCorneria_801E0678, with additional unchecked targets.
smart_moves: The PR treated the branch as reusable handoff material rather than final merge material; the body says it was opened to track progress and preserve useful work for a superseding PR.

The improved grCn_Data layout replaced an earlier smaller local typedef block and gave later functions shared names for indices, positions, joint_pairs, and entries instead of repeating raw offsets everywhere.
Flag unions in grArwing_GroundVars made byte/bit tests such as xC4_flags_b1, xC4_flags_b2, xC6_flags_b0, and xE0_flags_b0 expressible while preserving access to the full storage word.
Header prototypes were tightened only where the diff had concrete evidence from new callers/definitions, reducing use of UNK_RET and UNK_PARAMS without over-renaming the whole stage.
The color function grCorneria_801E2110 used static s32 RGBA constants and stack locals cast to GXColor*, which decomp.dev confirmed as a 100% new match.
The worklist in target_funcs.txt made clear which functions were believed complete and which remained unfinished, useful for a successor PR even though this branch closed unmerged.
decomp_lessons: For stage files with many interconnected placeholders, a partial struct layout can unlock multiple functions at once; here grCn_Data and grArwing_GroundVars informed object init, movement, camera selection, and animation setup.

Bitfield overlays are useful when decompiled code alternates between full-word fields and byte flag checks, but this PR still uses raw u8* casts in several functions, so future cleanup should verify endian/bit ordering and field ownership carefully.

M2C_FIELD is a practical bridge for unknown data tables such as grCn_804D69A0 offsets 0x3C, 0x40, 0x70, and 0x88, but the next pass should replace those offsets with named asset/config structs when evidence is available.
Near-matching C is valuable handoff material: decomp.dev listed many functions above 99% but not exact, so successor work should inspect codegen details rather than restart from scratch.
Watch data-section side effects separately from text matches; the bot reported a .sdata regression even though text matching improved.
When adding concrete prototypes in headers, keep the existing address comments and only replace UNK signatures for functions whose return and parameters are supported by definitions or callers.
naming_conventions: Corneria stage globals and local types use the grCn_ prefix, while functions keep the grCorneria_ address-suffixed naming convention.
Unknown struct fields use offset-style names such as x30, x48, xC4, xD0, xE0 and padding names such as pad_00, pad_54, and pad_4B0.
More meaningful names were introduced only where supported by use, such as indices, positions, joint_pairs, and entries in grCn_Data.
Flag bitfields follow the pattern xOFFSET_flags_bN, for example xC4_flags_b1, xC6_flags_b0, and xE0_flags_b0.
Small stage helper typedefs are stage-prefixed and descriptive enough for reuse: grCn_Entry, grCn_JointPair, grCn_ConvData, and grCn_Data.
Public prototypes in grcorneria.h preserve the address comment format, e.g. /* 1DCCFC */ s32 grCorneria_801DCCFC(void).
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK with exact byte counts in several functions; one existing padding site in grCorneria_801E1878 changed from PAD_STACK(16) to PAD_STACK(12).
Kept repeated Ground_801C0498 calls and magic float constants such as 3200.0f, 4800.0f, 1400.0f, 50.0f, 250.0f, 0.005f, and -0.0025f rather than prematurely simplifying expressions.
Used M2C_FIELD for untyped memory reads from grCn_804D69A0 and grCn_Data when exact asset/config structures were not established.
Used raw byte and typed reinterpret casts on Ground/GroundVars storage where the generated code appears to access flags or overlaid values by byte or alternate type.
Modeled state machines with explicit switch cases and integer state fields, especially grCorneria_801DDE88 and grCorneria_801E2228.

For grCorneria_801E25C4, matched joint setup by iterating grCn_803E1D38.joint_pairs, hiding non-selected JObjs with JOBJ_HIDDEN, storing selected joint pointers in grCn_ConvData, starting grAnime_801C8098 animations, and calling HSD_JObjAnimAll.
For grCorneria_801E2110, loaded static color words into stack locals before passing them as GXColor pointers, a pattern confirmed by the bot as fully matching.
review_feedback: No human review comments or review approvals were present in the slice.
Author note: "Will be superceded by another PR by nemo, opening to keep track of how far we got and to see if there's anything useful in here for them".
decomp.dev report for GALE01 f08c19a -> 10ce85e: matched code rose to 61.73%, +0.01%, +280 bytes.
decomp.dev reported one new full match: main/melee/gr/grcorneria grCorneria_801E2110, +280 bytes, 0.00% to 100.00%.

decomp.dev reported 13 improvements in unmatched grcorneria items, including grCorneria_801E0678 at 99.73%, grCorneria_801E2228 at 99.93%, grCorneria_801DD350 at 99.88%, and grCorneria_801E25C4 at 93.55%.
decomp.dev also reported one regression: main/melee/gr/grcorneria .sdata, -11 bytes, 70.97% to 51.16%.
follow_up_queries: Find Nemo's superseding grcorneria PR and compare against PR 2382's near-matching functions.
Check whether grCorneria_801E2110 static GXColor s32 constant pattern survived in the merged code.
Audit grArwing_GroundVars xC4/xC6/xE0 bitfield unions against raw u8* accesses in grcorneria.c.
Investigate decomp.dev .sdata regression caused by PR 2382's static color/global changes.
Use PR 2382 target_funcs.txt as a checklist for remaining grCorneria_801E1060 grCorneria_801E1970 grCorneria_801E03C8 grCorneria_801E277C work.
Replace M2C_FIELD grCn_804D69A0 offsets 0x3C 0x40 0x70 0x88 with named Corneria asset/config struct fields if later evidence exists.
